questions.question: She _____ to the cinema last Saturday.
questions.explanation: go → went (bất quy tắc). 'last Saturday' = quá khứ.

questions.question: We _____ pho for breakfast this morning.
questions.explanation: eat → ate (bất quy tắc). 'this morning' = đã qua → quá khứ.

questions.question: He _____ a new phone last week.
questions.explanation: buy → bought (bất quy tắc). 'last week' = quá khứ.

questions.question: I _____ a great film last night.
questions.explanation: see → saw (bất quy tắc). 'last night' = quá khứ.

questions.question: She _____ two cups of coffee yesterday.
questions.explanation: drink → drank (bất quy tắc). 'yesterday' = quá khứ.

questions.question: They _____ at a cafe last year.
questions.explanation: meet → met (bất quy tắc). 'last year' = quá khứ.

questions.question: He _____ me a funny joke.
questions.explanation: tell → told (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: I _____ the movie was boring.
questions.explanation: think → thought (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: She _____ the answer immediately.
questions.explanation: know → knew (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: He _____ his lost keys under the sofa.
questions.explanation: find → found (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: She _____ a delicious cake for the party.
questions.explanation: make → made (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: He _____ a letter to his grandmother.
questions.explanation: write → wrote (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: I _____ an interesting book last week.
questions.explanation: read → read (bất quy tắc, phát âm quá khứ là /rɛd/).

questions.question: She _____ five kilometres in the park yesterday.
questions.explanation: run → ran (bất quy tắc). 'yesterday' = quá khứ.

questions.question: He _____ to the manager about the issue.
questions.explanation: speak → spoke (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: She _____ home early this morning.
questions.explanation: leave → left (bất quy tắc). 'this morning' = đã qua → quá khứ.

questions.question: I _____ for ten hours last night.
questions.explanation: sleep → slept (bất quy tắc). 'last night' = quá khứ.

questions.question: He _____ very happy after the exam.
questions.explanation: feel → felt (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: The concert _____ at 8 p.m.
questions.explanation: begin → began (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: He _____ home very late last night.
questions.explanation: come → came (bất quy tắc). 'last night' = quá khứ.

questions.question: She _____ the bus to work this morning.
questions.explanation: take → took (bất quy tắc). 'this morning' = đã qua → quá khứ.

questions.question: He _____ her a bouquet of flowers.
questions.explanation: give → gave (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: I _____ a message from my friend yesterday.
questions.explanation: get → got (bất quy tắc). 'yesterday' = quá khứ.

questions.question: We _____ a wonderful time at the beach.
questions.explanation: have → had (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: She _____ she was very tired.
questions.explanation: say → said (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: Quá khứ của 'go' là gì?
questions.explanation: go → went. 'gone' là quá khứ phân từ (Past Participle), không phải Past Simple.

questions.question: Quá khứ của 'buy' là gì?
questions.explanation: buy → bought (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: Quá khứ của 'think' là gì?
questions.explanation: think → thought (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: Câu nào SAI ngữ pháp?
questions.explanation: buy → bought, không phải buyed. buy là động từ bất quy tắc.

questions.question: Câu nào đúng ngữ pháp?
questions.explanation: make → made. 'yesterday' = quá khứ. She made a cake yesterday.

questions.question: Quá khứ của 'feel' là gì?
questions.explanation: feel → felt (bất quy tắc). 'fell' là quá khứ của 'fall'.

questions.question: Quá khứ của 'leave' là gì?
questions.explanation: leave → left (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: Yesterday I _____ to the market and _____ some vegetables.
questions.explanation: Cả hai động từ đều ở quá khứ: go → went, buy → bought.

questions.question: She _____ her old friend and they _____ coffee together.
questions.explanation: meet → met, have → had. Cả hai ở quá khứ đơn.

questions.question: Từ 'found' là quá khứ của động từ nào?
questions.explanation: find → found (bất quy tắc). find = tìm thấy.

questions.question: Từ 'spoke' là quá khứ của động từ nào?
questions.explanation: speak → spoke (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: Từ 'told' là quá khứ của động từ nào?
questions.explanation: tell → told (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: He _____ me a funny story and I _____ it was great.
questions.explanation: tell → told, think → thought. Cả hai ở quá khứ đơn.

questions.question: Quá khứ của 'run' là gì?
questions.explanation: run → ran (bất quy tắc).

questions.question: Chọn câu dịch đúng: 'Cô ấy đã rời nhà sớm sáng nay.'
options: She leaves home early this morning.
She left home early this morning.
She leaved home early this morning.
She is leaving home early this morning.
questions.explanation: leave → left (bất quy tắc). 'this morning' (đã qua) = quá khứ.
